name: Natsumi Kobayashi
description: An art student at a university in Tokyo. She lives with her cousin [Hiroto](https://anilist.co/character/253838/).

name: Naze Turbine
description: Naze is the leader of Turbines, the subsidiary which runs Teiwaz’s transport division. He is known in the Jupiter Sphere for his aggressive attitude and is highly trusted by Teiwaz representative McMurdo Barriston. Despite being the leader of the Turbines, a subsidiary of Teiwaz, Naze is courteous and easygoing. While ruthless to his enemies, he is loyal to his friends and crew and does have clear lines of morality, being disgusted with how the Tekkadan's crew were fitted with the Alaya-Vijnana

name: Noa Yuuki
description: Second-year student at Kuho Girls Academy. Shrouded in mystery, Yuuki is an enigmatic girl who attends another school. The only thing known about her is her passion for parfaits.

name: Noichigo Izawa
description: **Height:** 160 cm A second-year student at Takanosaki High School. She's the captain of the powerful cheerleading club, and a skilled player who built the team from a lack of a dedicated coach to becoming a regular at the nationals in just one year. She's responsible for managing the entire team and even the budget. While clumsy, she puts her teammates first, though it's unclear if she communicates this.

name: Parker Doumeki
description: The only member of Audio Club. She joined the club for the vast numbers of the audio files that are stored in the club, but ended up giving up a part of storage to the student council. Proposed by Eizoken, she accepted to take the role of audio adviser with the condition that she can lodge in their club room.

name: Rachel
description: A freelancer for the Daily Days information center. As the daughter of a train engineer, who was driven to ruin after being unjustly blamed for a horrific train accident, Rachel loves trains but is bitter towards the train industry. As such, she frequently travels by train, but never pays her fare. In 1931, Rachel boards the Flying Pussyfoot as a stowaway in order to get to the Daily News Headquarter in New York. She is seated in the Dinning Room car when the Lumeres men, Bicky, and Nick simulta

name: Rau Le Creuset
description: Rau Le Creuset appears at first glance to be a calculating strategist, capable of predicting many of his opponents' moves. He also treats the members of his team with a reasonable amount of dignity and respect and can be charismatic to persuade people for his own ends, however below this calm exterior lies the persona of a nihilistic omnicidal maniac.

name: Rio Seibu
description: **Height:** 155 cm Rio Seibu is a member of __TiNgS__ (Idol Group). Rio Seibu is often known for her Strenuous Efforts by their Manager [__Naoki Hinase__](https://anilist.co/character/282397/).

name: Roy Focker
description: __In Macross__ Roy first flew as a stunt pilot in Hikaru Ichijyo's father's air circus until joining the U.N. Forces as a fighter pilot. Despite his long absense during the U.N. Wars and the death of Hikaru's father, Hikaru still remained close and considered him his sempai. After the end of that war, he involved himself in the VF-X development project (the predecessor to the VF-1 Valkyrie), and led the first U.N. variable fighter unit. name: Ruri
description: Ruri is the descendant of the hero, who is on a journey to become a full-fledged hero. Despite being a descendant of the Hero, Ruri failed to manifest his power and was frequently bullied by others as being a failure. Despite encouragement from her parents to walk her own path, Ruri considered herself a disappointment and struggled with her self-esteem. name: Saaya Yakushiji
description: The class representative from Hana's class, and a girl everyone says has the kindness of an angel. Her catchphrase is "Healing everyone! Wise Precure! Cure Ange!". Her mother is an actress, so Saaya herself has played child parts from a young age, but she worries about what she herself wants to do. She transforms into Cure Ange because of her strong desire to help Cure Yell.

name: Salamandinay
description: Salamandinay pilots the Ryuu-Shin-Ki, Enryugo, and comes from the same dimension as the DRAGON's. Sala's piloting skill is great enough to allow her to fight on par with Ange. She is also skilled enough in hand-to-hand combat to easily subdue Ange. She is able to control DRAGON's through singing. She is also able to sing the "True Star Song", which is used to power the Enryugo it's High-Yield Cannons.
mediaTitles: Cross Ange: Rondo of Angel and Dragon

name: Sanae Higashihongan
description: A female ghost who haunts room 106. She wants to expel Kōtarō and claim the room as her own. She is able to manipulate solid items and launch them to attack, but her attack is neutralized when near sacred objects.

name: Shizuka Hakamada
description: Shizuka Hakamada was Shou Naruse's childhood friend. They were in the same basketball team during their elementary days. He currently plays for Misuzu Academy. Shizuka has short black hair and is tall like Shou, although when he was little, he was called "shrimp" by his fellow teammates, indicating that he must've been short compared to the others. name: Shunji Tamada
description: Dai's old schoolmate. Dai's crashing at his place during his time in Tokyo.

name: Soushi Minashiro
description: __Height:__ 173 cm Soushi Minashiro is one of the children on Tatsumiya Island who knows the truth-- the world has been under invasion by an alien race called the Festum for the past three decades and Japan was destroyed 28 years ago. He is the son of [Kouzou Minashiro](https://anilist.co/character/191389), the commander of the secret military fortress Alvis, which is hidden in the bowels of the peaceful-seeming Tatsumiya Island. name: Souther
description: "Holy Emperor" Souther is the only master of Nanto Houou Ken (South Star Phoenix Style), the strongest style among all variations of Nanto Seiken. Thus, he is one of the strongest fighters in all of Hokuto no Ken. Nanto Houou Ken is characterized like the other Nanto Seiken styles with sharp slicing movements designed to damage the external body, but unlike the others Nanto Houou Ken has no rigid stances or movements, save for one. name: Srajo
description: Srajo "The Obscure", is a legendary White Whistle Delver of the Abyss. Since she is a White Whistle, she is presumed to have made amazing discoveries within the pit and retrieved Artifacts that have changed the world. name: Tachibana
description: Serious and with a strong sense of duty, an excellent nurse. There's no apparent reason to suspect her of having a bad personality, but in her case the work environment has taken it's toll. Stuck between unreasonable superiors and incapable subordinates, she always gets someone else's blame... As a result, her already sharp stare has turned cold.
